de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.metaconstruct.arith

Class MetaPow

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.AbstractOperator
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.AbstractSortedOperator
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.AbstractTermTransformer
          • de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.metaconstruct.arith.MetaPow
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Named, Operator, SortedOperator, SVSubstitute, TermTransformer, Sorted

    public final class MetaPow
extends AbstractTermTransformer
    Computes the pow function for literals. Computation fails if second argument is negative or exceeds Integer.MAX_VALUE (the latter due to restrictions of class BigInteger).

    • Field Summary

      • Fields inherited from class de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.AbstractTermTransformer
